MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT

This Agreement is entered into as of February 1, 2026, by and between:

PROVIDER: Threatlabs LLC, a Delaware limited liability company
Address: 1234 Innovation Drive, Suite 500, Austin, TX 78701
EIN: 84-3298471
Contact: Cory Brown, CEO, cory.brown@threatlabs.tech, (512) 555-3847

CLIENT: Meridian Healthcare Systems Inc., a California corporation
Address: 8900 Wilshire Boulevard, Floor 12, Beverly Hills, CA 90211
EIN: 95-4872103
Contact: Patricia Dominguez, General Counsel, p.dominguez@meridianhcs.com, (310) 555-2190

WHEREAS, Provider offers enterprise software solutions for data protection and privacy compliance;

ARTICLE 3 — PAYMENT TERMS
3.1 Client shall pay Provider $45,000/month for the Enterprise tier license.
3.2 Payment via wire to:
    Bank: Silicon Valley Bank
    Routing: 121140399
    Account: 3300194827
    Reference: MSA-2026-MHCS

3.3 Late payment contact: accounts@threatlabs.tech

ARTICLE 5 — DATA PROTECTION
5.1 Provider shall not access, store, or process any Protected Health Information (PHI) as defined under HIPAA.
5.2 Client's designated Data Protection Officer: Dr. James Whitfield, j.whitfield@meridianhcs.com
5.3 Security incidents shall be reported to security@meridianhcs.com within 24 hours.

ARTICLE 8 — AUTHORIZED REPRESENTATIVES
For Provider:
  Name: Cory Brown
  Title: CEO
  Email: cory.brown@threatlabs.tech
  SSN (for IRS W-9): 478-92-1034

For Client:
  Name: Patricia Dominguez
  Title: General Counsel
  Email: p.dominguez@meridianhcs.com
  Driver's License: CA D4829103 (for notarization)

EXECUTED as of the date first written above.

Notary: Jennifer Walsh, Commission #2234876, Los Angeles County
